The system attempts to locate a nearby, paired Apple Watch running watchOS 6 or later.

# watch

**Type Property**

Constraint to access an item with a watch.

## Declaration

```swift
static var watch: SecAccessControlCreateFlags { get }
```

## Discussion

The system attempts to locate a nearby, paired Apple Watch running watchOS 6 or later.
title: watch
